frame_note: F-33 school expenditures are reported in thousands of dollars; failure to multiply by 1,000 made per-pupil ~$21 instead of ~$21k — local K-12 lifetime assignment was off by 1000x until sweep 11 fix.

parameter_claims.notes: Pre-fix median was ~19.38 (thousands treated as dollars)

parameter_claims.page_ref: F-33 codebook / ENROLL vs TCUR* columns
parameter_claims.notes: ENROLL is pupil count; expenditure columns are thousands

parameter_claims.population: US average current expenditure per pupil
parameter_claims.notes: Sanity-check county median ~$19–21k against national digest
K-12 lifetime cost = per_pupil × years × children share — requires correct per_pupil units
School unit fix independent of housing stress source

generators.name: F-33 thousands gate
generators.prompt: On any school finance ingest: verify spend/enroll ratio is $8k–$30k/pupil. If median < $500, multiply expenditure columns by 1000 and re-run. Log fix in scenario meta.
generators.retrodiction: Would have caught ~$21 per-pupil in origin_fiscal_scenario before any local lifetime K-12 assignment; explains absurd local layer in sweep 0–10 memos.
generators.negative_space: Derived CSVs trusted without unit sanity band.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Census finance fields are nominal dollars

generators.name: County vs origin per-pupil join audit
generators.prompt: CORR(county current_spend_per_pupil, origin area_wtd_current_spend_per_pupil) after PUMA×origin join. Flag if r<0.3 or median ratio outside [0.5,2].
generators.retrodiction: Would have failed pre-fix correlation (scale mismatch) and passed post-fix (~$20k band).
generators.negative_space: Origin-level school cost accepted without county anchor check.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: PUMA area weights represent immigrant school placement
Current spend = marginal cost of immigrant pupil

generators.name: K-12 lifetime cost band
generators.prompt: For origin cell: area_wtd_per_pupil × 13 years × linked_share_with_school_age_children. Compare to NAS education cost component for <HS — same order of magnitude?
generators.retrodiction: Would have shown pre-fix K-12 cost ~1000x too low to matter in any local fiscal sum.
generators.negative_space: School costs omitted from local layer because proxy was numerically negligible (bug).
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Immigrant children use average county spend

generators.name: NCES digest triangulation
generators.prompt: Pull NCES Table 236.20 national per-pupil; compare to weighted mean of county F-33. Reject if national/county ratio outside [0.7,1.3] without RPP adjustment.
generators.retrodiction: Would have triangulated ~$19k county median against NCES national anchor after unit fix.
generators.negative_space: Single derived table accepted without external scalar check.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: National average equals immigrant destination average

theories_tested.theory: Per-pupil unit bug explained local layer null result
theories_tested.duckdb_test: SELECT origin_label, area_wtd_current_spend_per_pupil FROM lifetime.origin_fiscal_scenario_2023 WHERE origin_label='Mexico'
theories_tested.falsifier: Still ~$21 after rebuild — fix did not propagate

theories_tested.theory: County median aligns with NCES band
theories_tested.falsifier: Median outside band — remaining unit or aggregation error

theories_tested.theory: K-12 local cost material vs federal annual for Mexico
theories_tested.duckdb_test: SELECT area_wtd_current_spend_per_pupil, linked_mean_hh_school_age_children, avg_federal_net FROM lifetime.origin_fiscal_scenario_2023 WHERE origin_label='Mexico'
theories_tested.falsifier: Federal annual still dominates even with correct units — local layer secondary at annual frequency
